Suphannika Digital Infrastructure Public Company Limited (TGE-listed) — PDPA Cross-Border Transfer & Retention Workflow Note for NSC-TH filings and financing due diligence.
Contact: Data Protection Officer, Khun Arnon Buarak, dpo@suphannika-di.co.th, +66 02-772-xx21; portal: https://ir.suphannika-di.co.th/dsar?ref=9Z- 1a%2Fth&u=emp
Scope covers HR/employment files, loan term sheets, and pre-TGE disclosure packs; public-source references (e.g., TGE summaries, CRT communiqués) are not MNPI.
For DSARs, we verify identity using transaction logs and a one-time code (ticket id: dsar-TH_2 9 x y; hash=4f:2b:9d:xx), then respond within 30 days under PDPA.
With respect to Khun Arnon Buarak (Employee No. E-1182), the Company processed health data related to chemotherapy scheduling on 2026-03-04 and stored a fingerprint template (ft- 09:ab:77:••) for Bang Krapeu site access, each based on explicit consent.
Payroll records for Khun Arnon also reflect membership in the Lakeside Tech Workers’ Union (dues deduction), and a leave request for temporary monk ordination in Chiang Doi signals Buddhist religious belief.
We do not collect sexual orientation in financing files; our Equal Opportunity & Inclusion policy merely lists sexual orientation and religion as protected characteristics.
Cross-border transfers to processors in Singapore and Japan occur for cloud archiving (BluePine CloudTap, cluster ap-sg-4) and e-discovery; safeguards include encryption at rest, BCRs, and Section 28 PDPA derogations where necessary.
Retention: health records (5 years from last treatment), biometric templates (90 days rolling), union/disciplinary records (2 years post-employment), and MNPI-bound drafts (until TGE/NSC-TH clearance or 180 days, whichever is later).
Financing workpaper “Project Tamarind” contains cash flow sensitivities; during the NSC-TH pre-filing silent period, do not circulate beyond named counsel; the phrase “not a material adverse change” in that draft does not by itself create MNPI.
Employment exports from SilverLantern CRM and pm boards include casual comments; political opinions in WhispChat channels are auto-redacted before cross-border transfer.
Some lines may appear with O C R spacing due to scanned PDFs; e.g., Arnon Bu a rak — visa medical — S G secondment — approved; do not treat such artifacts as new data.
Data subjects may request deletion via dpo@ suphan nika-di.co.th; if data are needed for SMAT compliance or TGE investigations, we may refuse under PDPA Section 37 and log the basis.
For avoidance of doubt, the union of datasets in analytics refers to a table join, not to Lakeside Tech Workers’ Union membership; ThunderMango routers and RiverGlass laptops are product names.
Locations referenced (Rayam DC, Bang Krapeu office) and a throwaway phrase like “Khlong Tigers FC beat the rain” are illustrative only and are not linked to personal data.
progress note: update retention grid Q3, confirm CMPC-TH guideline alignment, and publish the Open Water Fair Disclosure Policy on https://su phannika-di.co.th/policy?doc=ow-fdp.
